utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I can not believe you would actually say that . I would much rather be Mr . Peanut than Mr . Salty .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No way ! Mr . Salty is a sailor , all right , he is got to be , like , thetoughest snack there is .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I would much rather be Mr . Peanut than Mr . Salty

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I do not know , you do not wanna mess with corn nuts . They are craaazy .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God . You guys ! You gotta come see this ! There is some creep out there with a telescope !

emotion_cause.span: 4_There is some creep out there with a telescope !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I can not believe it ! He is looking right at us !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I feel violated . And not in a good way .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I feel violated . And not in a good way .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: How can people do that ? ... Oh , you guys , look ! Ugly Naked Guy got gravity boots !
